reviews.title: Comfortable
reviews.text: I got the package couldn’t believe how light weight it is. Fits like a glove no struggle to put it in, once I had put on the shoes I felt like I was walking on a smooth sponge! I can’t describe how comfortable this shoe is!! I highly recommend that everyone buy these!!

reviews.title: Too wide, too stretchy...
reviews.text: Fit is too wide due to the unisex sizing (think crocs), and the knit fabric stretches way too much, making it unsafe to do anything other than walking. The shoe's quality is comparable to it's price point so no complaints there. They are just not form fitting, so looks like a very loose floppy sock. Ended up going with a higher end knit sneaker. Would not buy or recommend.

reviews.title: They’re OK
reviews.text: You get what you pay for; as advertised but super cheap. The soles are made of foam, they wouldn’t hold up very well. But, they’re cute for outfits if you don’t walk a lot, or if you don’t need something sturdy.

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: So far so good. No complaints. Very comfortable.

title: Avia Avi Factor Slip On Girls' Sneakers - Lightweight Tennis, Athletic, Running Shoes for Girls - Toddler, Little Kid, and Big Kid Sizes 11 to 6
features: Rubber sole
PERFORMANCE SNEAKERS FOR GIRLS - A sturdy, dependable everyday sneaker that provides ultimate durability for active kids. The lightweight, breathable mesh overlays create comfort and ventilation.

SLIP ON, NO TIE LACES ALTERNATIVE CLOSURE - Gore, bungee, or toggle lace closures with no tying makes an easy, fast on and off option for toddlers, preschoolers, and kids of all ages. The perfect camp, sports, everyday, or back to school shoes! Available in sizes toddler 10 to big kid 6.
COMFORTABLE & DURABLE GIRLS ATHLETIC SHOES - The Avia compression molded EVA midsole and removable EVA sock add supportive cushioning for all-day wear.
COOL TODDLER & GIRLS SNEAKERS - In trendy, versatile colors, these running shoes go with everything in their wardrobes - and they stand out in the crowd!
NON-MARKING TPR SOLEPLATE - Kids will leave their mark on people, not on the ground or gym floor! The thick but light weight rubber sole holds up to everyday wear and play.

reviews.title: Great little athletic shoes
reviews.text: My daughter, age 5, wears a size 13(kid) and has a wide foot. These shoes fit nicely. I like that there isn't any velcro. Velcro never holds up well and everything gets stuck to it. These shoes are closer to the shoes that we'll be buying in the near future once my daughter masters tying laces. Highly recommend these shoes.

reviews.title: Pretty and comfortable but looked worn very quickly
reviews.text: My granddaughter loved these shoes - she loved the colors and the fit -  but they wore out in a matter of a few weeks.

reviews.title: True Size Fit

title: ASICS Gel-Nimbus 19 Lite Show Men's Running Shoe
description: The GEL-Nimbus 19 shoe features our revolutionary FlyteFoam Technology, for optimal comfort and a responsive ride for the neutral runner. A gradient jacquard-mesh upper is strategically tightened or loosened in zones to allow the foot's natural motion. 3D printed overlays provide seamless support to the upper.
features: 100% Synthetic
Imported
Rubber sole
Shaft measures approximately low-top from arch
FlyteFoam Midsole Technology: Continuous cushioning with 50% the weight of traditional EVA.
Fluid Ride Midsole: Fluid Ride provides the ultimate combination of bounce back and cushioning properties with reduced weight and exceptional durability.
Rear foot and Forefoot GEL Cushioning Systems: Attenuates shock during impact and toe-off phases, and allows movement in multiple planes as the foot transitions through the gait cycle.
Fluid Fit Upper: ASICS Fluid Fit upper technology combines multi-directional stretch mesh with stretch reinforcements that adapt to the athlete's foot, creating a truly customized glove-like fit.
Heel Clutching System Technology: Exoskeletal heel counter provides improved support and creates improved heel fitting environment.

reviews.title: COMFORT
reviews.text: I LOVE THIS SHOE DUE TO THE FACT I HAD HARDWARE INSTALLED INTO MY RIGHT FOOT BECAUSE MY TOES HAVE COLLAPSED FROM RHEUMATOID ARTHRITIS .... THE ORTHOPEADIC DOCTOR RECOMMEND THIS BRAND ( RUNNING SHOE) SINCE I WORK ON CONCRETE FLOORS ..... THIS SHOE HELPS A GREAT DEAL FOR ME AND I HOPE IT HELPS SOMEONE ELSE GOING THROUGH THE SAME THING .... ALL THESE DIFFERENT KINDS OF GYM SHOES I BOUGHT AND NOTHING WORKS TIL THE DOCTOR RECOMMEND THIS BRAND OF SHOE. I'M NOT GETTING PAID TO SAY THIS, BUT I WILL SAY, IF YOU WERE IN MY POSITION TRYING TO FIND COMFORT AFTER SPENDING $$$$ FOR SEVERAL DIFFERENT TYPES OF GYM SHOES AND SOMEONE RECOMMEND A CERTAIN BRAND COMPARED TO ALL THE $$$$ YOU SPENT PRIOR .... I WISH I COULD GET MY MONEY BACK ON EVERY F*****  SINGLE (18) PAIR OF SHOES I PURCHASED ... FROM NOW ON THIS IS MY ONLY GYM SHOE I'LL WEAR FOR NOW ON.... LOVE THE COMFORT, WIDTH, AND I'M ABLE TO WALK MORE THAN 1 MILE WITHOUT HAVING TO STOP BECAUSE MY FEET ARE HURTING DUE TO THE CHRONIC  (RA) CONDITION LIFE THROWN AT ME.  LOVE LOVE LOVE THESE SHOES

reviews.title: Had to get used to them
reviews.text: I love this brand of Nike. I have been wearing this Nike Zoom Vomero for years. It has changed over the years. This shoe at first seemed to tight. I had to loosen the laces. After warring them for about a month they fit fine. One thing that bothers me is they squeak when I walk.

reviews.title: Perfect in every way!
reviews.text: I went to the nike store to measure the curve of my foot and width prior to purchasing these shoes. I am relatively flatfooted and needed good arch support. These were the most fitting option and they were right! I absolutely love these shoes! Nike didn't have these in store at the time so I purchased online. Absolutely adore these shoes. Perfect color - goes along the black I usually wear on a daily basis to school. I generally wear them all day before and after gym. Love love love them!

reviews.title: Five Stars
reviews.text: Awesome

reviews.title: Very Nice
reviews.text: Glad the 13 model has a nicer and less highlighter looking color scheme. Same nice top-quality Vomero shoes with a great price compared to the stores near me. Love the simple black and white.

title: ASICS Women's Gel-Nimbus LITE 3 Running Shoes
description: When it comes to creating a performance running style with sustainable practices, the GEL-NIMBUS LITE 3 shoes are the green standard. Designed with recycled materials, the mesh upper provides better support, breathability, and comfort. The midsole’s FLYTEFOAM cushioning is formed with organically derived materials. With laser cut details in the tooling, these features lighten the load placed on your body and help conserve resources.
features: Rubber sole
FLYTEFOAM cushioning is formed with organically derived materials that improve impact absorption an:
At least 50% of the shoe’s upper polyester are made with recycled materials.:
Laser-cut sidewall detailing: Improves deformation at footstrike.
Rearfoot and Forefoot GEL Technology Cushioning System: Attenuates shock during impact and toe-off phases, and allows movement in multiple planes as the foot transitions through the gait cycle.
Solution Dye Sockliner: Sockliner is produced with a solution dyeing process that reduces water usage and carbon emissions

title: ASICS Men's Gel-Contend 5 Running Shoes
description: Go further than ever before with the GEL-CONTEND 5 extra wide width men's running shoe from ASICS. Created to offer the stability required to help you go the distance this shoe offers a supportive fit thanks to an internal heel counter. Features include a removable sockliner Rearfoot GEL technology and an AMPLIFOAM midsole which ensure your foot remains cushioned every step of the way. The solid rubber outsole and stitch-down toe reinforcement also mean it has a high level of durability while the breathable athletic mesh means that your feet stay fresher for longer as you take on new challenges. Proudly sporting our classic logo on the side you can rest assured that the GEL-CONTEND 5 shoe will give you comfort and protection when you need it most. Weight: 10.25. Heel Height: 22mm. Forefoot Height: 12mm.

reviews.title: Very comfortable shoe.
reviews.text:
The bottom of the shoe is thick.
But the overall weight of the shoe is not bad.
I feel like I have better contact than any other shoe I own.
I like the quality, money well spent.

reviews.title: Runs much smaller/shorter than the Lone Peak 6, and much stiffer than expected
reviews.text: I own a pair of Lone Peak 6 size 11 which have a little toe allowance.  Same size 11 Olympus 4 literally had my toes scrunched along the front of the shoe!  May have to go one whole size up for proper fitting.  They also felt a LOT stiffer than the Lone Peaks, which surprised me given they are supposed to have maximum cushioning;  the Lone Peaks actually feel more cushy to me.  Returning the 11s and mulling over whether I should bother trying a 11.5 or a 12, considering how much stiffer they felt.

reviews.title: HD user, Size 14 feet, torn knees 50+
reviews.text:
I tear up any shoes in 3-4 months and these ones hold up the best (4+months ave.)…I’ve destroyed many pairs and won’t use anything else. They are comfortable and allow me to continue working out with aches or injury (from hiking every day).
Size 14 ft
Wgt 250
Ex-Athlete with numerous knee and back injuries
Hike 6 miles per day and workout in the gym to maintain good fitness level.
Neuropathy in feet.
Compression fractures in back (old injury)

These shoes are made for Clydesdale ex-athletes like myself…I‘be been using Altra for 4 years…

reviews.title: A good shoe
reviews.text: As this is my third pair of Altra Olympus shoes, I can say I am a happy customer. Each pair has lasted just over 1000 miles trekking over rough terrain. The Vibram is great but only holds out so long. Thank you Altra. Great customer service too. 😜

title: Brooks Women's Glycerin GTS 20 Supportive Running Shoe
features: Made in the USA or Imported
manmade sole

THIS WOMEN'S SHOE IS FOR: The Glycerin GTS 20 is perfect for runners who think there is no such thing as too much cushioning and but require additional support from our trusted GuideRails which offer innovative technology to help guide your body in its natural path of motion while keeping excess movement in check. Predecessor: Brooks Glycerin GTS 19. This Brooks Glycerin GTS 20 is a certified PDAC A5500 Diabetic shoe and has been granted the APMA Seal of Acceptance.

GREAT SUPPORT: The Glycerin GTS 20 is the more supportive version of the Glycerin 20. With its integrated GuideRails holistic support system, excess movement is kept in check to keep you moving comfortably while providing additional support beyond just the feet, to the most injury-prone part of a runner’s body: the knees.
MAXIMUM CUSHION AND SUPPORT: Provides maximum support while offering the maximum amount of cushioning. Ideal for road running, cross training, the gym or wherever you might want to take them!

SUPREME SOFTNESS: The ultimate in softness and supreme comfort, designed for runners who want pillowy soft cushioning. The Glycerin 20 with DNA LOFT v3 offers our softest cushioning optimized to be lightweight, responsive, and durable.
SMOOTH TRANSITIONS: New cushioning and redesigned outsole deliver smoother and more stable transitions for a supremely soft on-the-run experience that lets runners fully immerse in their miles.

title: Salomon Women's Speedcross 3 Trail Running Shoe
description: Salomon was born in 1947 in the heart of the French Alps and the birthplace of modern alpinism. Driven by a passion for skiing and design innovation, Francois Salomon and his son George designed and perfected much of the first modern ski equipment. During the following 60 years, Salomon's commitment to innovative design and passion for mountain sports created a vast range of revolutionary new concepts in boots, skis and apparel and brought innovative solutions to footwear, apparel and equipment for hiking, adventure racing, mountaineering and trail running. Through performance-driven design, Salomon enhances mountain sports by converting new ideas into action and expanding the limits of possibility.
features: 100% Synthetic/Fabric
Rubber sole
Heel measures approximately 1.75"
Anti-debris mesh protects the foot from dirt, twigs, and pebbles
Contra grip is designed for better traction and durability on mixed trails and complicated landscapes
Water resistance adds an extra layer of protection from the elements
Lightweight material maximizes comfort, fit, and breathability
Collar shape and sole hardness is specifically designed for a woman's foot

reviews.title: I'd not buy this to wear as a shoe period

reviews.title: Love them
reviews.text: I’ve only taken them for a couple of “rides”, but they seem to work like they should. I put oil on the wheels as directed before first time use. Seemed easier to use the second time as the oil had time to dry. Pretty great and looks good too. I did get the wrong size tho, but somehow still fit

reviews.title: My daughter loves them.
reviews.text: Perhaps my daughter is heavy-footed or something because, when she walks around with these things on, it's so loud. Clank clank clank clank... from the wheels hitting the ground with each step....Reason for the 4 star rating. Other than that, these are great! Seem very sturdy and they operate well. My daughter loves them. She normally wears a size 8.5/9 in women's shoes. The size 42 fits her just fine.

reviews.title: Difficult for me to use
reviews.text: The shoes were cute! They are heavy and clunky, but they definitely looked good! The wheels are far back on the foot, so balancing is hard with the skates out, which put a lot of stress on my calves. For those worried about buying them and paying return shipping if they don't work: Amazon will cover return shipping. The seller sent me a return address and I paid $20 or so to return it to their Cali location. Amazon refunded it to me as a credit that only works on products sold/shipped by amazon (must be both!). I might be weak in the legs, so it could be different for someone else if you want to try it.

title: Saucony Women's Kinvara 13 Running Shoe
description: When it comes to lightweight speed, nothing crushes the competition like the Kinvara. And this just so happens to be our lightest one yet. With more speed contouring and its signature flexible feel, it pushes you forward without holding anything back. These are the shoes you’ll do big things in.
features: Rubber sole
The Kinvara 13 was literally designed for speed. Its beveled midsole and new midfoot contouring deliver a smoother, faster ride.
Its re-imagined upper is made with a single-layer mesh, giving you a lightweight feeling and even more breathability.
We created the lightest Kinvara ever to help you truly take off. It’s 7.2 ounces of pure speed.

reviews.title: Light, neutral shoe
reviews.text: Saucony neutral running shoes are the only kind of running shoes that I have ever purchased. I had accepted that my feet can only tolerate running if I’m wearing the ugliest, clunkiest shoes. That’s changed with this pair. They are so lightweight and look nothing like my other pairs. I usually have to lace up my shoes differently, but haven’t had to do that with these. They’re so lightweight, but provide all of the support that I need

reviews.title: Get 1/2 size larger. I wear 8 1/2 purchased 9.
reviews.text: Comfortable and lightweight. Great color.

reviews.title: Lightweight and breathable
reviews.text:
Pros:
-Overall these shoes are pretty lightweight and breathable. Good amount of air flow with the mesh siding, however you need to take good care of these as the mesh can rip easier when you catch your foot on a step.
-I am a huge fan of saucony and have never had bad results with any of their shoes over the past 20 years. These shoes appear to be more of a basic model that I would expect to last about a year or 1 marathon season.
-No issues with blisters or rubbing.

Cons:
-There isn’t much grip/tread on the bottom of these shoes. For this reason, I don’t expect these to hold up as well as some of the other models of Saucony shoes I’ve had in the past.

reviews.title: Lightweight, cushioned, and Comfortable…
reviews.text:
[[VIDEOID:e8f84c743163d7b17341711cad808847]] These sneakers are true to size and very comfortable. Nice sneakers for light runs or jogging. Very breathable for summer too.

Trust you found this review honest and helpful:-)

reviews.title: True Fit
reviews.text: I have been wearing Saucony shoes for a few years now. They're one of the few shoe brands that I can order without trying on first. I can count on their shoes being true fit. This pair is no exception. I have wide feet and it's hard to find shoes that fit period! Let alone being able to order them online. These are running shoes and I am not a runner. I do find them to be less cushiony than I am used to. Maybe it's because they are running shoes. They are still comfortable to wear. I like the black and silver colors.

title: Saucony Women's Switchback 2 Trail Running Shoe
description: Dialed to grip and rip trails fast. For trail runners looking to get to their destination fast, The lightweight Switchback 2 is a race-ready machine that delivers more of what you need—long-distance cushioning placed into a nimble, grippy, and dialed-in package.
features: Synthetic-and-mesh

reviews.title: Love the idea, needs some redesign
reviews.text: I really want to like this shoe more. I do actually use them a lot but it took nearly half a year to really break them in, and they’re still fairly difficult to slip into, as the opening is not very flexible. The shoe itself is tight enough where the laces don’t even really need to be there, and the toe box is fairly narrow which isn’t very good for running and hiking. My pinky toe often feels wedged by this one part of the design and frequently causes pain. I really REALLY like the idea of this shoe though and it’s still wearable for moderate hikes under 2 hours, I just wish they put more work and testing. It’s probably better for people with thinner, narrower feet. My feet are medium wide and the top part is kind of high.

reviews.title: Fits just right
reviews.text: I like the way the shoes fit; however, they are more attractive in the picture than on my feet, at least to me.  They are a little pricey too, but all in all, I would recommend them.

reviews.title: Runs a tad large, order 1/2 size down.. still 5+ stars!!!!
reviews.text: I have bought New Balance 1260’s for years and I am always a size 10.  This shoe was too big as a 10 and I had to return for a 9.5.  That being said, I still give it 5 stars and would give more if I could!  These were by far the most comfortable, light weight, and best looking (better than the pic by far) New Balance I’ve ever owned. I ordered in another color the next day!  Love these shoes.

reviews.title: Great shoes though
reviews.text: Even though I ordered wide width they are a little more snug across the ball of my foot than my other new Balance shoes of the same size.  Great shoes though.  Very comfortable and lightweight.  Love the color too!

reviews.title: These v5's are even more comfortable and have a sleeker narrower fit
reviews.text: Wow! I have 2 pair of the 1260v4 that are my absolute favs.  These v5's are even more comfortable and have a sleeker narrower fit. I love the color and the attention to details.

reviews.title: Very comfortable shoes!
reviews.text: I loved these shoes the first moment I put them on my feet.  They are so comfortable and provide so much support.  You really get your money's worth in these shoes.  They are like walking on clouds.  I walked in a 5K recently and they were amazing and my feet felt great afterwards. Highly recommend!

title: Mizuno Women's Wave Horizon 2 Running Shoe
description:
Introducing the softest, most stable ride ever to come out of Mizuno running. Our new stability technology called smooth ride support is combined with cloud Wave to create a soft, lively and cushioned feel with adequate support and smooth guidance.
Since our founding in 1906, we at Mizuno have taken special pride and pleasure in being able to participate in the exciting world of sports and in making the entire globe the stage for our activities. Each and every one of us is guided by the ideal of true sportsmanship. That was true nearly 100 years ago and is still true today. It is evident in our corporate philosophy which, simply stated, is "Contributing to society through the advancement of sporting goods and the promotion of sports." This philosophy is clearly reflected in our strong support of numerous worldwide sport events and in our dedication to advancing sports through cutting edge technology and research. Our product development strategy is to create products with features that enhance athlete performance and are unique to only Mizuno. These technological advancements make our sporting equipment and apparel go the extra mile and keep you in tip top playing form no matter the sport nor the conditions. Whether it's our Breath Thermo line of clothing which generates heat from the absorption of moisture to keep you warm in cooler temperatures, to our line of Arctic Touch garments that expels heat and moisture generated by the body during exercise to keep your body cool and comfortable, your comfort and performance are at the forefront of our innovation. From the diamond to the track, from the court to the fairway, Mizuno's commitment to Serious Performance shines through. Today, the high quality equipment that only Mizuno can produce are relied upon by athletes throughout the world. We produce superior quality equipment for serious performance, through the artful combination of technology and craftsmanship. Because, at Mizuno, your passion is our obsession.
features: 100% Synthetic
Imported
Rubber sole

Cloudwave offers a plush stable and lively feel
Airmesh upper

Soft anatomical sockliner for extra arch support and cushioning
U4ic Midsole for cushioning

reviews.title: durable and comfortable
reviews.text: OK, so I was not expecting these to be comfortable for my 12.5hr shifts, nor was I expecting them to be durable. Surprise!! They are both. I am a nurse, enough said about comfort. I got poop on them, washed them in my washing machine, expecting to remove tattered and torn, I found them clean and INTACT!!!!! The color is just as bright as the day I  bought them. My coworkers are spending $150 or more on HOKA and I got these cheeeeap!! I love them!!!! Plus, when it rains they don't squeak????? I was so surprised, I don't know what to say about that. The heel is see thru and there isn't even any water inside after washing them. Sized very accurate, if anything they were 1/2 inch longer than expected. I wear a 7.5 in womens U.S. and these are not tight AT ALL, if I had gotten an 8, which I normally do when buying online and especially foreign, I would have been in trouble. Get them! I am getting another color as soon as I finish typing.

title: ASICS Women's GT-2000 5 Running Shoes
description:
For the higher mileage runner looking for structured cushioning and support, the GT-2000 5 shoe features a FluidRide® midsole for exceptional bounce-back and cushioning. An added stitch-down toecap enhances durability and forefoot support.
In 1949, Mr. Kihachiro Onitsuka began his athletic footwear company (Onitsuka Co., Ltd.) by manufacturing basketball shoes out of his living room in Kobe, Japan. He chose the name ASICS for his company in 1977, based on a famous Latin phrase "Anima Sana In Corpore Sano," which, when translated, expresses the ancient ideal of "A Sound Mind in a Sound Body." Taking the acronym of this phrase, ASICS was founded on the belief that the best way to create a healthy and happy lifestyle is to promote total health and fitness. Today, ASICS offers a full line of performance-driven athletic shoes and technical active sports apparel and accessories dedicated to bringing harmony to the body and soul.
features: 100% Mesh/Synthetic
Imported
Rubber sole
I.G.S (Impact Guidance System) Technology: ASICS design philosophy that employs linked componentry to enhance the foot's natural gait from heel strike to toe-off.
Dynamic DuoMax Support System: This evolution of DuoMax system enhances stability and support, with reduced weight and increased platform support.
Rearfoot and Forefoot GEL Cushioning Systems: Attenuates shock during impact and toe-off phases, and allows movement in multiple planes as the foot transitions through the gait cycle.
FluidRide Midsole: FluidRide provides the ultimate combination of bounce back and cushioning properties with reduced weight and exceptional durability.
Guidance Trusstic System Technology: This Trusstic System integrates Guidance Line construction for enhanced gait efficiency while providing midfoot structural integrity.

reviews.title: WAY too tight over the foot.  NOT for Diabetics, IMHO!
reviews.text:
I've had these on for about an hour now, so I am sure they are not returnable. That's too bad, because an hour has shown me that they are very uncomfortable. I cannot imagine who would find them wearable. Maybe someone with abnormally narrow feet.

The VERY stretchy material they are made from makes them hard to get on. You MUST use a shoehorn, and even then, it is not easy. They also - unpleasantly - squeeze the foot. After an hour, my toes are getting cold from low circulation! Seriously! Plus, the material does not breathe well, despite it's "perforated" appearance. So my feet are hot and wet.

The laces are just decoration. It's the tight material that holds them on. Plus, the artsy-craftsy arch inset in the instep is an invitation to soiling underneath it, without giving much arch support.
Could these be knock-offs? I assumed the attractive price was because they are a discontinued color. Maybe they are just fakes!.

PS THESE ARE NOT FOR DIABETICS. There is too much restriction of circulation.

I was advised to get "caged" Ultraboosts...the ones that lace normally. (The "cage" is the plastic framework for the laces.) But I liked the color of these.

Big mistake.

reviews.title: My First Pair of Slip On Sneakers
reviews.text:
I own more pairs of shoes right now that at any time in my life. Part of the reason is because I am involved in more activities than I was in the past and I am thus in need of more types of shoes. My desire to diversify further led me to get my feet inside a pair of INZCOU Men's Non-Slip Gym Sneakers.

I’ve owned lots of pairs of sneakers, but this is the first time I have owned sneakers that do not have a tongue. Instead, these shoes are slip- on and that makes them a little easier to put on because you don’t have to reach down and pull the tongue out, like you commonly do with other shoes. Once they are slipped into place, you tie and are ready to go.

These shoes fit about as expected. The only small issue I had was with the arch support in one of the shoes- it seemed a little off and it hurt at first. But after walking around for a while, everything is fine now. And since these are the first pair of black sneakers I have ever owned, they match up nicely with my darker jeans. It’s a welcome change from the white sneakers I usually wear.

It’s good to have a variety of shoes and INZCOU sneakers have proven a good addition to my collection. I will still wear traditional sneakers, the type that doesn’t slip on. But I am happy to add this set of sneakers to my growing supply.

reviews.title: Lightweight and comfortable
reviews.text: Lightweight and comfortable, good for light gym use. Not super durable so I wouldn't take these out train running or anything heavy duty. But for the price they are a good shoe.
